subtitulo: In our first year, we already made an impact across Latin America.

eventosTimeline.descripcion: National bootcamp on generative AI fundamentals. 300+ signups, 40 full scholarships in Peru and Chile. 16 international speakers.
Event for founders: 'Do you really need AI in your processes?' Cutting through hype to find real needs.
Participation in Tech Fest and Platzi Conf. Staff at AI Hackathon Colombia. Networking with LATAM tech leaders.
Peru's largest AI hackathon. 1,000+ signups, 120 selected. 24 hours building. $1,500 USD in prizes.
